Class ProductDAO

java.lang.Object
IPOS_Detailed_Design.dao.ProductDAO
public class ProductDAO extends Object
ProductDAO — handles all database operations for the Catalogue table. Replaces the in-memory List catalogue in OrderService with real MySQL calls. Uses your exact Product field names: getProductId(), getAvailability(), getPackageCost() etc.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductDAO

      public ProductDAO()

  • Method Details

    • addProduct

      public boolean addProduct(Product p)

    • getNextProductId

      public String getNextProductId()
      Generates the next available ProductID in the format "100-NNNNN", incrementing from the highest numeric suffix currently in the Catalogue table. Falls back to "100-00001" if the table is empty or no matching IDs exist.

    • updateStockLimit

      public boolean updateStockLimit(String productId, int newLimit)

    • getProductById

      public Product getProductById(String productId)

    • getAllActiveProducts

      public List<Product> getAllActiveProducts()
      Get all active products — shown to merchants browsing the catalogue. Replaces OrderService.getCatalogue() which returned a hardcoded list.

    • searchProducts

      public List<Product> searchProducts(String keyword)
      Search catalogue by product ID, name, description, or category. Powers the search field in the Catalogue tab — UC-SA-CAT-02 (5 marks).

    • getLowStockProducts

      public List<Product> getLowStockProducts()
      Get all products below their stock limit. UC-SA-CAT-04 (automatic low stock alert on login) and UC-SA-CAT-05 (report).

    • checkStock

      public int checkStock(String productId)
      Check stock for one product — matches OrderService.checkStock(String itemId).

    • updateProduct

      public boolean updateProduct(Product p)

    • addStock

      public boolean addStock(String productId, int quantity)
      Add stock when warehouse receives new delivery. UC-SA-CAT-03 — Add New Stock.

    • deductStock

      public boolean deductStock(String productId, int quantity)
      Deduct stock when an order is placed. Returns false if there is not enough stock — order should be rejected.

    • deleteProduct

      public boolean deleteProduct(String productId)
